# Addit

This README is encoded. To restore it, run:

```
./decode_readme
```

To re-encode after decoding, run `./encode_readme`. Both scripts are
idempotent — running either one when the README is already in that
state is a no-op, so you can run them as many times as you want
without corrupting the file. Encoded and decoded are the only two
possible states.

<!-- ----- ENCODED ----- -->

<!-- ----- END ----- -->
